headline: GRS-GPS Alliance Demands Borneo Affairs Ministry
context: Combined GRS-GPS parliamentary bloc of 49 MPs formally requested creation of a dedicated Ministry of Borneo Affairs in 2026 cabinet.

cards.big: 49 Borneo MPs demand creation of Ministry of Borneo Affairs
cards.sub: GRS and GPS say existing KKBBA lacks ministerial authority to enforce decisions

cards.big: KKBBA budget of RM2.1 billion in 2026 is less than 1% of federal spending
cards.sub: Borneo bloc argues full ministry needs at least RM8 billion annual allocation

cards.big: Current arrangement under PM Department has no legislative enforcement power
cards.sub: Borneo affairs decisions can be overruled by individual line ministries

cards.big: Prime Minister offered a Minister with full cabinet rank as compromise
cards.sub: GPS rejected offer saying post must come with dedicated enforcement machinery

cards.big: Ministry demand tests whether Borneo bloc can convert parliamentary weight into structure
A Borneo Affairs Ministry would institutionalise what ad hoc negotiations have failed to deliver.
